findings.finding: Agent-writable readiness handoff is not trusted as authorization: Symphony replays the deterministic readiness operation through GameApi.Client, requires a completed durable receipt, and independently fetches the normalized pull request before starting the merge-capable deployment-verifier role.
findings.evidence: post_approval_coordinator.ex confirm_authoritative_readiness/2 and validate_current_pull_request/2; exact-commit adversarial fabricated-confirmation test passed.

findings.finding: Readiness remains bound to the AgentRun repository, issue, run, pull request number, and exact head SHA; current PR state must be open and non-draft. Stale HEAD, closed PR, provider failure, malformed handoff, or unconfirmed receipt fail closed before merge/deployment.
findings.evidence: readiness_identity/2, readiness_identity_matches?/2, readiness_outcome/1, validate_readiness_receipt/1, and exact-commit targeted/full-suite evidence.

findings.finding: The change adds only game-api internal endpoints via GameApi.Client and introduces no direct GitHub REST/GraphQL access or GitHub credential handling in Symphony.
findings.evidence: Diff from origin/main at c3554e69d100bbf2a0fe5ec4badfbd8459138dc4 changes three files and routes readiness mutation/readback through GameApi.Client.

summary: Passed: exact-commit evidence and targeted source review affirm that PR readiness is idempotent, exact-HEAD-bound, authoritative through game-api, and fail-closed against forged workspace handoffs before any merge-capable role starts.
